mentions.note: Record order volume but profitability lagging; trades at 32x earnings premium. Tony Xu strong manager and #1 company in field, but valuation rich. Better bought near $100–120 if gas/consumer spending slows.

Down 30% from caller's entry; buy rated because investors rotating out of software into hardware; group of Uber, DoorDash, Reddit all suffering from mega-rotation into semiconductors; fundamental business sound but capital flows unfavorable.
Down 34% Q1 on AI displacement fears for online marketplaces; Cramer disagrees—once user base exists, network effects durable; stock cheapest ever; can be bought here.
Another brand company from last 6-7 years that Cramer really likes; fits pattern of consumer-facing digital monopolies with strong network effects.
